documentation.text:
@title Interface for the ArtCommission contract
 @dev The DAO uses this interface to read dispute participants and resolve the case.

@title ArtDAO
 @dev This contract:
 1. Maintains DAO NFT ownership
 2. Runs NFT auctions
 3. Selects jurors for disputes using weighted lottery
 4. Accepts juror votes
 5. Resolves disputes by calling the corresponding commission contract
 Important:
 The random selection here is good enough for a school project prototype,
 but not secure enough for production. In production, use Chainlink VRF or
 another secure randomness source.

@dev Simple NFT ownership model.
 This is not a full ERC721 implementation, but it matches your current DAO design.

@dev Tracks how many DAO NFTs each address owns.
 Jury selection weight is based on this number.

@dev Keep a registry of addresses that have ever held a DAO NFT.
 We keep them in the array even if they later sell all tokens.
@dev Prevent multiple simultaneous active disputes for the same commission.
@dev Vote choices for dispute resolution.

@dev Stores all information about one DAO dispute.
 jurors:
 - selected jurors for this dispute
 voteOf:
 - each juror's selected vote
 hasVoted:
 - whether that juror already voted
@dev Mint a new DAO NFT into the DAO treasury and immediately start an auction.
@dev Internal helper to start an auction.
@dev Place a bid on an active auction.
@dev Settle an auction after it ends.
@dev Transfer a DAO NFT from one owner to another.
@dev Return the number of DAO NFTs owned by an address.
@dev Return the owner of a specific DAO NFT.
@dev Return treasury ETH balance.

@dev Create a new dispute case.
 Usually this is called by an ArtCommission contract after it enters Disputed state.

@dev Select jurors for a dispute using weighted lottery.
 Weight rule:
 - A holder with more DAO NFTs has higher probability of being selected.
 Excluded addresses:
 - the DAO treasury itself
 - the artist in the commission
 - the buyer in the commission
 Jurors are selected without duplication.
@dev Selected jurors cast their vote.

@dev Resolve the dispute based on majority vote.
 Rule:
 - strict highest vote wins
 - ties default to Neither
@dev Return selected jurors for a dispute.
@dev Return current vote counts for a dispute.
@dev Return whether a specific juror voted and what they voted for.

@dev Return all known holders ever registered in the DAO.
 Useful for debugging and testing.
@dev Add a holder to the registry if not already present.

@dev Move token ownership and keep holder balances in sync.
 from == address(0) means mint.

@dev Build the list of eligible juror candidates and their weights.
 A holder is eligible if:
 - they are not the DAO treasury
 - they are not the artist
 - they are not the buyer
 - they own at least one DAO NFT
@dev Return true if user is one of the selected jurors for this dispute.
@dev Return true if every selected juror has already voted.

It must return its Solidity selector to confirm the token transfer. If any other value is returned or the interface is not implemented by the recipient, the transfer will be reverted. The selector can be obtained in Solidity with `IERC721Receiver.onERC721Received.selector`."}},"title":"ERC-721 token receiver interface","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"@openzeppelin/contracts/token/ERC721/IERC721Receiver.sol":"IERC721Receiver"},"evmVersion":"paris","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":false,"runs":200},"remappings":[]},"sources":{"@openzeppelin/contracts/token/ERC721/IERC721Receiver.sol":{"keccak256":"0x88cd5e3bee2e8c36b8d9058fbcaa81ad5704281b25634122234b55ea853d8055","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://8dc7e7ab5b8ea36c15027ab04221b05d1c970f47a53e9fd47ead8ca665d49c7e","dweb:/ipfs/Qmeeph7fsDyfRr8vb2L8KcDEmKPb224TAayMvgqgGAnqpL"]}},"version":1}

contract: 1. Maintains DAO NFT ownership 2. Runs NFT auctions 3. Selects jurors for disputes using weighted lottery 4. Accepts juror votes 5. Resolves disputes by calling the corresponding commission contract Important: The random selection here is good enough for a school project prototype, but not secure enough for production. In production, use Chainlink VRF or another secure randomness source.","kind":"dev","methods":{"balanceOf(address)":{"details":"Return the number of DAO NFTs owned by an address."},"bid(uint256)":{"details":"Place a bid on an active auction."},"createDisputeCase(address,uint256,uint256)":{"details":"Create a new dispute case. Usually this is called by an ArtCommission contract after it enters Disputed state."},"getAllHolders()":{"details":"Return all known holders ever registered in the DAO. Useful for debugging and testing."},"getJurorVote(uint256,address)":{"details":"Return whether a specific juror voted and what they voted for."},"getJurors(uint256)":{"details":"Return selected jurors for a dispute."},"getVoteCounts(uint256)":{"details":"Return current vote counts for a dispute."},"mint()":{"details":"Mint a new DAO NFT into the DAO treasury and immediately start an auction."},"ownerOf(uint256)":{"details":"Return the owner of a specific DAO NFT."},"resolveDispute(uint256)":{"details":"Resolve the dispute based on majority vote. Rule: - strict highest vote wins - ties default to Neither"},"selectJurors(uint256,uint256)":{"details":"Select jurors for a dispute using weighted lottery. Weight rule: - A holder with more DAO NFTs has higher probability of being selected. Excluded addresses: - the DAO treasury itself - the artist in the commission - the buyer in the commission Jurors are selected without duplication."},"settleAuction(uint256)":{"details":"Settle an auction after it ends."},"transfer(address,uint256)":{"details":"Transfer a DAO NFT from one owner to another."},"treasuryBalance()":{"details":"Return treasury ETH balance."},"vote(uint256,uint8)":{"details":"Selected jurors cast their vote."}},"stateVariables":{"commissionHasActiveDispute":{"details":"Prevent multiple simultaneous active disputes for the same commission."},"holderBalance":{"details":"Tracks how many DAO NFTs each address owns. Jury selection weight is based on this number."},"holderExists":{"details":"Keep a registry of addresses that have ever held a DAO NFT. We keep them in the array even if they later sell all tokens."},"tokenOwner":{"details":"Simple NFT ownership model. This is not a full ERC721 implementation, but it matches your current DAO design."}},"title":"ArtDAO","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"contracts/art_dao.sol":"ArtDAO"},"evmVersion":"paris","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":false,"runs":200},"remappings":[]},"sources":{"contracts/art_dao.sol":{"keccak256":"0x73892dab71deb04d366f012df315c076153ab448879095d88800452cd15b25dd","license":"UNLICENSED","urls":["bzz-raw://38c68b9d58b1ab51fd04c049964ebd5f14ff3644ab2e3d9d3903f8001b03d17e","dweb:/ipfs/QmToKGiZaA2bBgWiwPntgKfLpG37X6wf5nKWAjn7qjps4a"]}},"version":1}
